summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin User CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) feature on /api/admin/all-users endpoints and frontend page /app/admin/all-users. All 11 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including dialogs for create/edit/delete operations.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/admin/all-users - returns 200 with list of users
✅ GET /api/admin/all-users - each user has required fields (id, email, name, roles, status, agency_id, agency_name)
✅ GET /api/admin/all-users - requires auth (returns 401 without token)
✅ POST /api/admin/all-users - creates new user with correct agency_name
✅ POST /api/admin/all-users - duplicate email returns 409
✅ PUT /api/admin/all-users/{user_id} - updates user name
✅ PUT /api/admin/all-users/{user_id} - updates user role (agency_agent to agency_admin)
✅ PUT /api/admin/all-users/{user_id} - updates user status (active/disabled)
✅ PUT /api/admin/all-users/{user_id} - non-existent user returns 404
✅ DELETE /api/admin/all-users/{user_id} - deletes user and returns {ok: true, deleted_id}
✅ DELETE /api/admin/all-users/{user_id} - non-existent user returns 404
✅ Frontend: /app/admin/all-users page loads with user table and summary cards
✅ Frontend: 'Yeni Kullanici' button opens create dialog with all fields (name, email, password, agency, role)
✅ Frontend: Create dialog has data-testid attributes (create-user-name, create-user-email, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Edit (pencil) button opens edit dialog pre-filled with user data
✅ Frontend: Edit dialog has fields for name, email, agency, role, status
✅ Frontend: Delete (trash) button opens confirmation dialog
✅ Frontend: Delete dialog shows user email and has confirm/cancel buttons
✅ Frontend: Search input filters users
✅ Frontend: Agency filter dropdown present
✅ Frontend: Status filter dropdown present
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints properly implement CRUD with correct status codes (200, 404, 409)
User creation correctly hashes password and assigns agency_id
Update endpoint handles email duplicate check correctly
Delete endpoint returns proper response format {ok, deleted_id}
Frontend correctly implements all data-testid attributes as specified
Dialogs use shadcn Dialog/AlertDialog components properly
seed_data_creation: Test users created and deleted during tests (prefixed with test_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin User CRUD fully tested. Endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE on /api/admin/all-users. Frontend page at /app/admin/all-users shows unified view with search, filters, and inline actions. Note: Login has rate limiting (5 min cooldown). Agencies available: Demo Acenta (f5f7a2a3-5de1-4d65-b700-ec4f9807d83a), Demo Acente A (a8456a97-f714-4c69-bc7e-d58c3b7d088d), Demo Acente B (301121c7-30c1-4048-b0d4-9b51c38915ac).

api_verification.GET /api/admin/all-users: ✅ 200 - Returns list of agency users with agency_name populated
api_verification.POST /api/admin/all-users: ✅ 200 - Creates user with email, name, password, agency_id, role
api_verification.PUT /api/admin/all-users/{user_id}: ✅ 200 - Updates name, email, role, status, agency_id
api_verification.DELETE /api/admin/all-users/{user_id}: ✅ 200 - Hard deletes user and returns confirmation

frontend_verification.Summary cards: Toplam Kullanici, Aktif, Pasif, Acenta Sayisi
frontend_verification.Search input: data-testid='user-search' - filters by email, name, agency
